display.purpose: Large KPI values and high-priority headline moments.

headline.purpose: Screen and section titles in the dashboard shell.

body.purpose: Supportive explanatory text and operational hints.

label.purpose: Uppercase micro-labels and compact metadata markers.

shadows.name: soft-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating mobile nav and high-level shell separation.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Primary state transitions for button and nav controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action control for submit, confirm, and proceed flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #14b8a6; color: #050505; border: 1px solid rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.3); border-radius: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; font: 500 14px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0d9488; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action with low visual weight inside dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #141414; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; font: 500 14px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Low-emphasis icon action for contextual controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #b5b5b5; border: none; border-radius: 8px; width: 40px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #fafafa; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Primary text field with dark raised surface and strong focus signal.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .ds-input-label { color: #b5b5b5; font: 500 14px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { height: 44px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); background: #141414; color: #fafafa; padding: 0 12px; font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7a7a7a; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Core container module for plan and dashboard sections.
components.html:
Weekly Plan

Review sessions and recovery targets for the current cycle.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0d0d0d; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #232323; border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); max-width: 420px; } .ds-card:hover { background: #141414; border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font: 700 20px/1.25 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-copy { margin: 0; color: #b5b5b5; font: 400 14px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Desktop Nav Pill
components.description: Pill-driven route selector in the top dock navigation.
components.html: HomePlanChat
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .ds-nav-item { color: #b5b5b5; text-decoration: none; font: 600 14px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 24px; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #e5e5e5; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #fafafa; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }

narrative.overview:
This system is built for users checking plans, workouts, and recovery in short, high-focus sessions, often early morning or late evening. The interface behaves like an instrument panel, low glare, high contrast, and explicit next actions.

The visual personality follows PRODUCT.md directly: practical, intelligent, and accountable. Surfaces stay quiet and monochrome so recommendation moments and critical actions carry visual authority. The system explicitly rejects noisy motivational aesthetics, sterile medical bureaucracy, badge-first gamification, and over-designed "AI" styling.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome-first workspace with one action accent.
Dense but readable hierarchy tuned for decision speed.
Tactile controls with clear state feedback.
Flat-by-default depth model with restrained lift cues.
Utility copy and labels that prioritize action clarity.

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is reserved for explicit actions and selected state confirmation, never for decorative fills.

rules.name: The Operator Density Rule
rules.body: Use short, high-contrast text blocks and avoid paragraph-heavy sections in decision-critical screens.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces stay flat, lift appears only when state needs to be acknowledged.

dos: Do keep neutral surfaces dominant (#050505, #0d0d0d, #141414) and reserve teal for explicit action intent.
Do use clear state feedback on controls: hover, focus-visible, and active must all be visually distinct.
Do preserve compact hierarchy for operational scanning, especially in dashboard and plan flows.
Do keep cards and modules function-led, with borders and tonal layering instead of decorative effects.
donts: Don't mimic generic motivational fitness apps that over-index on hype and streak pressure.
Don't drift into clinical health dashboards that feel cold, bureaucratic, or hard to act on.
Don't ship gamified interfaces that prioritize badges and novelty over training quality and adherence.
Don't introduce over-designed "AI" aesthetics that reduce trust in recommendation quality.
Don't use border-left or border-right accents greater than 1px as visual decoration.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism defaults, or repetitive identical card grids.
